node.statement: COORDINATE MAPS ARE NORM-NONINCREASING (max-norm). Working in the order-unit norm of B and the injective order-unit cochain norm (def-injective-cochain-norm, node 1.1). From ||x|| = max_r ||x_r|| (GT-hyp E5, node 1.1): (i) for each r, ||x_r|| <= max_s ||x_s|| = ||x||, so the coordinate projection P_r is norm-nonincreasing, ||P_r y|| <= ||y|| for all y in B. (ii) ||x_{!=r}|| = ||x - x_r|| = ||sum_{s != r} x_s|| = max_{s != r} ||x_s|| <= max_s ||x_s|| = ||x|| (the max-norm of the off-block part is the max over s != r, dominated by the full max). (iii) ||e_r|| = 1 (node 1.1, via GT-jb-unit-norm-one). CONSEQUENCE for cochain restrictions: for the same-factor restriction f^r(a,b) = P_r f(a,b) with a,b in B_r (node 1.2), ||f^r||_inj = sup_{||a||,||b|| <= 1, a,b in B_r} ||P_r f(a,b)|| <= sup_{||a||,||b|| <= 1 in B} ||f(a,b)|| = ||f||_inj, using (i) (P_r norm-1) and that the sup over the B_r-unit-ball is over a subset of the B-unit-ball (||a|| <= 1, a in B_r implies ||a|| <= 1 in B since the norm is inherited, node 1.1). Hence ||f^r|| <= ||f|| for every r.
